description: Dual-front camera profile for CARLA ego vehicle: Mitsubishi i-MiEV style wide 90 deg + narrow 50 deg cameras. Uses rgb_1 and rgb_3 to match TrainingConfig.rgb_camera_ids=(1,3).
notes: Attach these cameras to the CARLA ego/hero vehicle through SensorAgent.sensors().
This profile is intended for checkpoints trained with dual_front_camera_mode and rgb_camera_ids=(1,3).
If the checkpoint expects sequential rgb_1/rgb_2 ids, use the rgb_1_rgb_2 profile instead.
